name: vscode-cli-harness-bridge
description: VS Code extension + CLI bridge for terminal-native agent harnesses

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @vchb/protocol && npm run build --workspace vscode-cli-harness-bridge && npm run build --workspace @vchb/cli
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/protocol/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/extension/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json
scripts.package:vsix: npm run build --workspace vscode-cli-harness-bridge && cd packages/extension && vsce package --no-dependencies --no-git-tag-version
